modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble formatting tables in Word during a call.

full_description_text: The user was trying to format tables in Word but couldn't figure it out. They were on the phone and seemed frustrated with the options available. They mentioned something about needing to adjust borders and shading but got stuck. It was clear they needed help with the basic formatting features.
short_description: Trouble formatting tables in Word during a call.
description: The user was trying to format tables in Word but couldn't figure it out. They were on the phone and seemed frustrated with the options available. They mentioned something about needing to adjust borders and shading but got stuck. It was clear they needed help with the basic formatting features.
